name: Emily / Class of 09 [Canon]
description:
“You’re actually really pretty, which is why I wanna look you in the eyes when i STAB YOU”

A Class of 09 Single.

After watching some Class of 09 clips, I kinda realized that my Jecka, and Emily bots were pretty ass. They didn’t even take place in the school, what in hell was I thinking.

That probably happened because I was writing all those bots one after another, so writing scenarios in Lake Braddock was… boring.

This time around, you get to enjoy her actual psycho, yandere-esque chaos at its fullest.

How the hell do people get to the trending page?
creator: KaitoNa
